title: N-gram Language Models
content: N-gram language models estimate the probability of a token using a fixed context window and are foundational for perplexity-based evaluation.
snippet: N-gram language models estimate the probability of the next token from a fixed context window.

title: Hidden Markov Models for POS Tagging
content: Hidden Markov Models are generative probabilistic models widely used for part-of-speech tagging and other sequence labeling problems.
snippet: HMMs are classical sequence models for tagging and decoding with Viterbi.

title: CKY Parsing
content: CKY is a dynamic programming algorithm for constituency parsing under context-free grammars in Chomsky Normal Form.
snippet: CKY uses chart parsing and dynamic programming for syntax trees.
